name: keka
description: Reads Keka HRIS employees, attendance, leave types, leave requests, clients, and projects through the Keka REST API.

risk.read: external Keka HRIS/PSA API read of employee, attendance, leave, and client/project data

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); the AuthHook's real token exchange target is config.token_url, a config key wholly separate from base_url (unlike github's hook, whose token endpoint IS relative to base_url) -- conformance's synthetic non-secret config sets token_url to the literal string "synthetic-conformance-value", never the replay server's own address, so the hook's real HTTP POST can never land on the replay server; every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively. Hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/keka (the AuthHook's real grant_type=kekaapi + api_key token exchange, run against a shared httptest token server, RAW record parity against legacy).
